segments.text: How did Levis go from this mess to this batwing logo? For decades, Levis had too many logos and nobody can pin it down.
Sales was slipping fast. Then they called in Turner Duckworth to craft a single mark, the batwing. That arc in
every pocket since 1873. The designers loved that mark. But how do you turn a stitching into a logo? They tested hundreds of versions, got the curves
perfect, made it red like the tap, then kept the cropped R mistake as their secret signature. The Batwing was born.
Today, Levis is known by that one shape.
And that Batwing logo, it needs no words. The logo you wear everyday was hiding in your batwing pocket. If you want more amazing design stories,
